bead.title: Migrate codex-related tests to interface mocks
bead.description:

bead.acceptance:
1. service_route_attempts_test.go, service_status_test.go, service_providers_test.go, harness_golden_integration_test.go no longer reference codexharness exports beyond the dispatcher constructor
2. Codex package tests run as package codex (white-box) where needed
3. go test ./... passes; runtime budget maintained
